title: QA Bug Report — Checkout Smoke Test Failure
author: kai.torres
content:
QA SMOKE TEST FAILURE — Launch Alpha Pre-Launch Check
Reporter: Kai Torres | Date: 2026-04-25 08:05 UTC
Ticket: NOVA-143 | Status: BLOCKED

Test: Checkout flow end-to-end smoke test (staging environment)
Result: FAIL

Failure details:
- Step: Submit checkout form
- Expected: 200 OK with checkout_session_id
- Actual: 404 Not Found at POST /v2/checkout
- Error: The launch page integration is still calling /v1/checkout. The v2 endpoint is live but the client has not been updated.

Blocked by: NOVA-142 (launch page integration update)
Estimated unblock: Pending Derek's fix merge

All other smoke test steps PASS. Checkout integration is the only blocker for QA sign-off.
